title: El agua nos llama — VSG Group Exhibition
description: The first exhibition of Virtual Studio Groups artists in Spain. Fifteen artists, fifteen relationships with water — sculpture, photography, installation, collage, and painting.

title: Dreams — VSG Group Exhibition
description: A collective wall of dream images. Twenty-one artists contributed square-format works that together form a shared interior landscape.

title: VSG at Supermarket Art Fair
description: VSG participated in Supermarket Art Fair Stockholm, the independent art fair for artist-run spaces and projects.
